articles.author: Tim Fernholz
articles.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race - TechCrunch
articles.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.
articles.content:
When do we take AI doomers seriously? 
That’s a key subtext of Elon Musk’s attempt to shut down OpenAI’s for-profit AI business. His attorneys argue that the organization was set up as a charity foc… [+3519 chars]
